MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Feb-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on PETITIONER LYCHE ARELLANO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is adopted as follows: Off calendar for both parties' failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Courtesy copies of petition, response, and accompanying papers needed. Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Nguyen. Matter not reported. (301/RCE)
